The '''Plug-G ''Gargantua''''' was a [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] produced by [[Collor Pondrat/Legends|Collor Pondrat]] and used around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] and was still seen in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Debuting after the [[Plug-F Mammoth Split-X engine/Legends|Plug-F ''Mammoth'']] [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]], the ''Gargantua'' model surpassed its predecessor's sales.<ref name="EV" />

When the [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba's]] ''Mammoth'' was defeated and ultimately destroyed during the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] of [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] bought the [[Anakin Skywalker's Podracer/Legends|podracer]] that had been built and used by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to win the race. However, his son [[Hekula]] destroyed it and Skywalker would later reclaim what was left of the pod. Sebulba then bought a new ''Gargantua''. The [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] would use it in many races and was the vehicle that he used against Skywalker's rebuilt [[Radon-Ulzer/Legends|Radon-Ulzer]] at the Boonta Eve Classic of [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]].<ref name="Star Wars: Racer Revenge">''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Gargantua'' is selectable as Sebulba's vehicle in the game ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]''. It is fair in cooling, repair and acceleration, excels in defense and handling, but top speed is where it shines the best.

{{Veh-stub}}
